meta.notes: Norwegian household electricity — NATIONAL AVERAGE from Statistics Norway (SSB), StatBank table 09387. All-in 122.0 øre/kWh PAID (= gross 195.1 øre/kWh, less 73.1 øre/kWh government electricity support): electricity incl. tax 145.8 + grid rent incl. tax 49.3. Licensed NLOD (Norwegian Licence for Open Government Data) — attribute Statistics Norway. A national average, not a shoppable plan. Period 2026K1.
